hero.descriptionLine1: Join the ultimate dining experience - where taste meets convenience. Your next

handpickedselection.title: Handpicked Selection
handpickedselection.description: We partner only with the best local kitchens and highly-rated chefs to guarantee a premium and delicious experience every time.

real-timetracking.title: Real-Time Tracking

24/7customersupport.title: 24/7 Customer Support
24/7customersupport.description: Hungry at 2 AM? We’ve got you covered. Our support team is always online to resolve any issues and ensure your food arrives hot.

sectionData.description: From local hidden gems to top-rated restaurants, we make ordering your favorite meals fast, fresh, and hassle-free. Discover new flavors with seamless delivery and round-the-clock support.

trending.heading: Trending Now
trending.description: From cozy local cafes to premium dining spots, discover the best places to satisfy your cravings right now.

hero.label: About service
hero.aside: Defilicious helps customers order food quickly, while restaurants manage delivery, menus, and orders in one place.
hero.title: About Defilicious
hero.lead: Defilicious is a digital food ordering service that connects customers, restaurants, and delivery in one clear system.
hero.description: We are building more than a restaurant catalog. Defilicious makes ordering faster, more transparent, and more convenient: from choosing a dish to payment and real-time delivery tracking.
hero.clientsText: Fast dish selection, convenient payment, repeat favorite orders, and real-time delivery control.
hero.restaurantsText: Menu, stop-list, order, kitchen process, and sales analytics management.

mission.label: OUR MISSION
mission.title: Our goal is to remove chaos from food ordering.
mission.firstText: Defilicious was created to make delivery clear for every participant: the customer sees what is happening with the order, the restaurant quickly manages the menu and kitchen, and the system helps avoid unnecessary mistakes.
mission.secondText: We want users to avoid wasting time on long choices, stop worrying about delivery status, and order food in the most convenient way. For businesses, this means less chaos in operations, faster menu updates, and transparent performance analytics.

audience.label: Audience
audience.title: Who Defilicious is made for
audience.intro: Defilicious is created for two key audiences: people who want to order food quickly and without stress, and restaurants that need a convenient tool for managing orders, menus, and kitchen processes.

items.quickFind: Find a dish quickly without browsing menus for too long
items.trackOrder: See order status and courier movement
items.paymentOptions: Choose a convenient payment method: card, Apple Pay, Google Pay, or cash
items.repeatOrder: Repeat a favorite order in one click
items.ecoOptions: Use eco-friendly options, such as refusing extra cutlery
items.honestInfo: Get quality photos, dish ingredients, and honest information about the restaurant

items.editMenu: Quickly edit the menu and stop-list
items.stableWork: Work reliably even during power or internet interruptions
items.salesAnalytics: See transparent analytics for sales, popular dishes, and real profit
items.peakHours: Reduce chaos during peak working hours

denis.name: Denis Korzhyk
denis.summary: Responsible for product logic, user experience, interface structure, and the visual system of Defilicious.
details: Has 6 years of design experience and works at the intersection of UX/UI, business analysis, and product strategy. Specializes in creating clear user flows, optimizing funnels, automating processes, and improving business metrics through design.

bohdan.name: Bohdan Shevchenko
bohdan.summary: Responsible for technical implementation, project architecture, and stability of the core service features.
details: Has 4 years of experience creating websites and web applications, worked with commercial products and large companies. Understands the full development cycle: from application structure to feature implementation, code optimization, and preparing the product for scaling.

artem.name: Artem Hrebeniuk
artem.summary: Responsible for functional modules, application logic integration, and stable work of separate system parts.
details: Has experience with different types of projects, from dynamic web services to systems connected with transactions, analytics, and high reliability requirements. Understands the importance of security, data accuracy, and stable interaction between product components.

mykola.name: Mykola Hitis
mykola.summary: Responsible for engineering quality, testing, security, bug detection, and application stability.
details: Focuses on checking the system in real and complex scenarios: incorrect user actions, data errors, authorization issues, access problems, or potential security risks.

stack.label: Stack
stack.title: Technology stack
stack.description: To build Defilicious, we use a modern JavaScript stack that helps us develop the interface quickly, build server logic, work with the database, and support project scalability.

methodology.label: Methodology
methodology.buildTextFirst: Defilicious is developed incrementally. We build the product step by step: implement separate parts of the functionality, test them early, improve them, and then move on to the next stage.
methodology.buildTextSecond: This approach helps us see results faster, reduce risks, and maintain quality while the product grows.
methodology.worksTextFirst: The incremental model allows the team to work with more control and clarity. Instead of building everything at once, we focus on smaller parts, validate decisions early, and improve the product continuously.
methodology.worksTextSecond: This makes development more flexible, helps us react faster to issues, and keeps the product stable as it evolves.

hero.title: Today's best food deals in one place

sushi.description: Save on selected sushi sets, rolls and combo boxes today.

student.title: Student Lunch Combo
student.description: Healthy bowl, drink and dessert at a special student price.

pizza.description: Buy one wood-fired pizza and get the second one 50% off.

family.description: A full dinner set for 3-4 people with curry, rice, naan and drinks.

sweet.title: Sweet Weekend Box

choose.title: Choose a deal
choose.text: Pick from limited-time offers, free delivery options or restaurant discounts.

cart.title: Add to cart
cart.text: The discount is applied automatically or with a promo code.

enjoy.title: Enjoy your order
enjoy.text: Track your delivery and get your food fresh and on time.

hero.title: Fast delivery with full control
hero.description: Track your order from the restaurant kitchen to your door with clear statuses, estimated time and delivery updates.

stats.paymentLabel: Card, Apple Pay, Google Pay or cash

timeline.label: Order status
timeline.title: How delivery works
timeline.description: Every step has a clear status, so customers know where the order is and restaurants can prepare without rush.

orderPlaced.title: Order placed
orderPlaced.text: Choose your dishes, confirm your order and select a payment method.

restaurantConfirms.title: Restaurant confirms
restaurantConfirms.text: The restaurant accepts the order and starts preparing your food.

preparing.title: Preparing
preparing.text: The kitchen prepares your meal and updates the order status.

courierPickup.title: Courier pickup
courierPickup.text: A courier picks up the order when the food is almost ready.

delivered.title: Delivered
delivered.text: Your order arrives fresh, warm and ready to enjoy.

delivery.optionsTitle: Choose the delivery mode that fits your day
delivery.optionsDescription: From everyday delivery to pickup, Defilicious keeps timing and fees clear before checkout.

scheduled.title: Scheduled Delivery
scheduled.text: Choose a delivery time in advance.

pickup.title: Pickup
pickup.text: Order online and pick up yourself.

restaurantLogic.label: Restaurant side
restaurantLogic.title: Built for restaurants too
restaurantLogic.description: Defilicious helps restaurants avoid delivery chaos. Couriers are requested when the order is almost ready, so food does not wait too long and arrives fresher.

track.question: How can I track my order?
track.answer: You can track your order status in real time after checkout.

cash.question: Can I pay with cash?
cash.answer: Yes. Defilicious supports card payments, Apple Pay, Google Pay and cash.

delayed.question: What happens if the restaurant is delayed?
delayed.answer: The estimated delivery time updates automatically, so you always see the latest status.

schedule.question: Can I schedule delivery?
schedule.answer: Yes, selected restaurants support scheduled delivery.
